zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：短期横盘震荡偏多
zh.content:
近期以太坊价格在$1658.19至$1675.94区间内波动，短线呈现横盘整理态势。当前价格$1670.33接近20日SMA$1671.71，显示价格正围绕均线震荡，趋势尚未形成明确突破，短期市场情绪偏中性偏多。

MACD指标显示主线2.30977，信号线未提供，但主线仍在正区间，表明多头动能存在支撑，但力度有限。缺乏RSI数据使超买超卖判断不明，需关注后续动能变化，以判断价格可能的方向延续或反转。

支撑位可参考近期低点$1658.19和心理整数位$1650附近，阻力位在近期高点$1675.94及$1680整合区域。若价格突破阻力，有望形成短线拉升；若跌破支撑，则可能回踩$1650区域。

交易建议上，短线可考虑逢低布局多单，止损设置在$1655以下以控制风险；激进投资者可在突破$1676后跟进上行仓位，保持风险管理和仓位控制，适合短线波段操作为主。

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Ethereum is showing signs of short-term consolidation around the $1,670 area, with the price slightly above the 20-period SMA at $1,671.71. This suggests a neutral bias as the market is hovering near key dynamic support. Recent daily swings between $1,658 and $1,675 indicate the formation of a narrow trading range, with buyers defending levels near $1,658. Momentum appears muted, highlighting a wait-and-see phase before the next directional move.  

The MACD reading of 2.31 points to bullish momentum building, though the absence of a signal line limits the confirmation strength. Without a clear RSI, overbought or oversold conditions are harder to assess, so traders should rely on price action around SMA levels. If Ethereum sustains above the 20-period SMA, it may attract short-term buyers, while a drop below $1,658 could trigger additional selling pressure toward the next support near $1,645.  

Key resistance sits at $1,675, slightly above the daily high, followed by stronger resistance around $1,690, which could cap upside in the near term. Support is confirmed near $1,658, with further backing at $1,645. Price oscillations around these levels are likely to guide intraday strategies, with traders needing confirmation of breaks before committing to longer positions.  

Trading suggestions favor cautious long entries near support, especially if bullish candlestick patterns emerge, while shorts could be considered closer to $1,675 with tight stop-losses. Swing traders may look for a breakout above $1,675 to target $1,690, whereas downside breaches of $1,658 would shift focus to $1,645. Overall, Ethereum’s market structure suggests measured positioning until more decisive momentum appears.
